LASSO regression (lambda selection by information criterion or CV)

Source: R/fit_regression.r
fit_lasso.Rd

LASSO regression (lambda selection by information criterion or CV)

Usage

fit_lasso(y, Xp, lambda = "BIC")

Arguments

y

response variable

Xp

predictor matrix

lambda

lambda selection method "lambda.min" : minimum CV prediction error "lambda.1se" : CV 1SE rule "AIC" : minimum AIC "BIC" : minimum BIC, default

Value

coefficient vector

On this page
